chapter_title.ar: بَابُ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَثِيراً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – Abundant mention of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/134)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/134)
text: مَنْ أَكْثَرَ ذِكْرَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَظَلَّهُ اللَّهُ فِي جَنَّتِهِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha, from Dawood Al Hammar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The one who frequents the Zikr (Mention) of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic, Allahazwj would Shade him in Hisazwj Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla ibn Muhammad from al- Washsha’ from Dawud al-Hammar from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever speaks of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, very often, Allah will provide him a shadow in paradise.’”
